title: acmispon tomentosus
intro: Acmispon tomentosus, also known as woolly prairie clover, is a perennial legume native to the western United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Acmispon tomentosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Acmispon tomentosus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine practices.
